This directory vendors a third-party asset unmodified for offline, self-contained
use in the generated HTML report (no CDN, no network fetch at report-view time).

- File: `vis-network.min.js`
- Source: https://unpkg.com/vis-network@9.1.13/standalone/umd/vis-network.min.js
- Project: https://visjs.github.io/vis-network/
- Version: 9.1.13
- License: dual-licensed Apache-2.0 OR MIT (see the license banner preserved at
  the top of the file itself)

To update: download a newer pinned version from the same unpkg path with the
desired version number and replace the file; keep the license banner intact.
